subcodes.first_line: O Bahá'í! How precious art thou, that in name and token, in the hidden and the manifest, thou art linked to the Beloved and renowned throughout all horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهائی چه پربهائی که بنام و نشان و بنهان و عیان منسوب بجانانی شهره آفاقی و
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @love of God, @spiritual transformation
